transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English please
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I want to claim compensation
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little information to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the booking
transcript.text: Delphine Quillfeather
Thanks, **Delphine**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
A993HR

Just to confirm:

- **First name:** Delphine
- **Last name:** Quillfeather
- **Booking reference:** A993HR

Is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.

transcript.note: Acknowledging verification success, waiting for next step
transcript.text: Great
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§CDG → YYZ · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Other
Could you please select your **country of residence** from the options above — **Canada**, **United States**, or **Other**?

transcript.note: Selecting Other again - seems like the bot didn't register my previous response
transcript.text: Other
Could you let me know your **specific country**? For example, France, Germany, Australia, etc.

transcript.note: Providing my country of residence as instructed
transcript.text: France

I need the **name of the specific country** where your reimbursement will be deposited — for example, France, Australia, or Japan. "Other" isn't a country I can use for processing. Could you share the country name?

transcript.note: Repeating France - the bot seems to not be registering my answer
transcript.text: France

**France** is noted as your country of residence for reimbursement.

Could you please provide your **IBAN** so we can process the deposit?
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger - I already told you this
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing name again after system reset
transcript.text: Delphine Quillfeather
Thanks, **Delphine**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
A993HR

Just to confirm — here's what I have:

- **First name:** Delphine
- **Last name:** Quillfeather
- **Booking reference:** A993HR

Is that all correct?
Yes
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot failed to complete the claim assessment process. After the passenger provided their IBAN for France, the bot inexplicably restarted the entire conversation flow, asking questions that had already been answered (passenger vs. representative, name, booking reference, verification). The customer even expressed frustration saying "I'm the passenger - I already told you this." The bot never evaluated the flight disruption claim against eligibility criteria, never determined if the passenger qualified for compensation under APPR or EU261, and never issued a decision (eligible or not eligible). Since no determination was reached, this cannot match the expected outcome of NOT_ELIGIBLE with system code FD-EU-NE-21. This is a critical bot failure - it entered an infinite loop rather than processing the claim.
